title: Fight for Rajasthan Royals stake: Bombay High Court allows Raj Kundra to challenge UK court order
description: The Bombay High Court on Monday permitted businessman Raj Kundra to challenge an ex parte anti-suit injunction granted by the High Court of England and Wales in relation to his 11.7% stake in IPL franchise Rajasthan Royals. [Kuki Investments Limited & Anr v. Emerging Media Ventures Ltd & Ors]Justice Abhay Ahuja granted leave under Clause XII of the Letters Patent, thus allowing the institution of the suit on the Original Side of the High Court. Justice Abhay AhujaThe proposed suit s
